calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Sep-21-2015 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from The Presiding Judge Department 206 for Short Cause Trial/Entry of Judgment; No appearance by Defendant(s).
Department 514, Judge: Charles Crompton, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, Proceedings reported by: Sonia Wong, CSR#11288.
Anthony DiPiero, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A.
No appearance on behalf or by Defendant TIMOTHY DUGAN.
Declaration of Wandi Chamberlain pursuant to CCP 98, submitted in lieu of testimony.
After evidence, Court ordered the following Judgment entered in favor of Plaintiff and against Defendant as follows:
Principal $20,373.27
Pre-Judgment Interest $0.00
Attorney's Fees $0.00
Costs $429.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $20,802.27
Judgment signed in open court.
